v2026-05-04 16:53:48

2026-05-04 16:53:48

auto

@lhl

Created by smart-doc

1.商品管理

1.1.查询商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

status

int16

审核状态

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

brandId

string

店铺ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=exkfpf&order=ad74og&name=deneen.will&status=32100&goodsId=175&brandId=175&goodsSn=0rsk9b

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "p453w9",
  "errmsg": "cwx1eh",
  "data": {}
}

1.2.获取店铺与分类选择列表

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 获取店铺与分类选择列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "2rp7gx",
  "errmsg": "g6agef",
  "data": {}
}

1.3.编辑商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

goods

object

商品基本信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

└─goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

└─name

string

商品名称

false

-

└─categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

└─brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

└─gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

└─brief

string

商品简介

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

└─shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

└─address

string

自提地址

false

-

└─isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

└─isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

└─isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

└─isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

└─unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

└─counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

└─retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

└─detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

└─remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

└─status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

└─weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

products

array

货品信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品货品表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specifications

array

商品规格值列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─price

number

商品货品价格

false

-

└─number

int32

商品货品数量

false

-

└─url

string

商品货品图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

grouponRules

object

团购规则

false

-

└─id

string

团购规则表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

└─discount

number

优惠金额

false

-

└─discountMember

int32

团购人数

false

-

└─expireTime

string

团购过期时间

false

-

└─status

int16

团购规则状态，正常上线则0，到期自动下线则1，管理手动下线则2

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

attributes

array

商品参数

false

-

└─id

string

商品参数表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─attribute

string

商品参数名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品参数值

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

specifications

array

商品规格

false

-

└─id

string

商品规格表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specification

string

商品规格名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品规格值

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品规格图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/update --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "175",
    "goodsSn": "bpvoqw",
    "name": "deneen.will",
    "categoryId": "175",
    "brandId": "175",
    "gallery": [
      "syzzlp"
    ],
    "keywords": "ye6zi7",
    "brief": "r5wzwm",
    "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
    "shareUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
    "address": "177 Doyle Crest， North Lincolnhaven， LA 36975",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "b4tt4h",
    "counterPrice": 540,
    "retailPrice": 683,
    "detail": "wrfn3b",
    "remarks": "9k2r4d",
    "status": 1785,
    "weight": 407,
    "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "175",
    "version": 183
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "175",
      "goodsId": "175",
      "specifications": [
        "vu88wa"
      ],
      "price": 659,
      "number": 489,
      "url": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "175",
      "version": 506
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "175",
    "goodsId": "175",
    "goodsName": "deneen.will",
    "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
    "discount": 479,
    "discountMember": 575,
    "expireTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "status": 23818,
    "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "175",
    "version": 234
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "175",
      "goodsId": "175",
      "attribute": "eqvrtf",
      "value": "efwevr",
      "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "175",
      "version": 103
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "175",
      "goodsId": "175",
      "specification": "1lr26h",
      "value": "kck7na",
      "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "175",
      "version": 404
    }
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "l867kc",
  "errmsg": "e64o9d",
  "data": {}
}

1.4.删除商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 删除商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/delete --data 'id=175'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "gj3tux",
  "errmsg": "816v5p",
  "data": {}
}

1.5.批量删除商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/batch-delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 批量删除商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

ids

array

id列表

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/batch-delete --data '{
  "ids": [
    "iksqzp"
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "rhe21v",
  "errmsg": "15rm8q",
  "data": {}
}

1.6.商品上下架

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/on-sale

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 商品上下架

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

brief

string

商品简介

false

-

picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/on-sale --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "goodsSn": "82uru0",
  "name": "deneen.will",
  "categoryId": "175",
  "brandId": "175",
  "gallery": [
    "h3920g"
  ],
  "keywords": "ajvv1p",
  "brief": "bktbkj",
  "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "shareUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "address": "177 Doyle Crest， North Lincolnhaven， LA 36975",
  "isGroupon": true,
  "isNew": true,
  "isHot": true,
  "isTakeTheir": true,
  "unit": "s323c4",
  "counterPrice": 389,
  "retailPrice": 782,
  "detail": "9sit7p",
  "remarks": "w11iz5",
  "status": 5255,
  "weight": 667,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 714
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "nazpty",
  "errmsg": "kkowx0",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

goods

object

商品基本信息

false

-

└─id

string

false

-

string

false

-

string

false

-

string

false

-

string

false

array

false

string

false

string

string

false

false

boolean

false

-

└─isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

└─isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

boolean

是否自提

false

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

number

string

false

-

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

int32

权重用于排序

false

products

array

false

└─id

string

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specifications

array

商品规格值列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─price

number

商品货品价格

false

int32

false

grouponRules

object

false

string

false

false

false

false

int16

false

false

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/create --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "175",
    "goodsSn": "qodunf",
    "name": "deneen.will",
    "categoryId": "175",
    "brandId": "175",
    "gallery": [
      "1gitk6"
    ],
    "keywords": "31nhuz",
    "brief": "rmo7al",
    "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
    "shareUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
    "address": "177 Doyle Crest， North Lincolnhaven， LA 36975",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "fegfjf",
    "counterPrice": 708,
    "retailPrice": 749,
    "detail": "9u2cax",
    "remarks": "dlo1ak",
    "status": 26691,
    "weight": 29,
    "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "175",
    "version": 859
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "175",
      "goodsId": "175",
      "specifications": [
        "djgsfb"
      ],
      "price": 886,
      "number": 895,
      "url": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "175",
      "version": 153
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "175",
    "goodsId": "175",
    "goodsName": "deneen.will",
    "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
    "discount": 628,
    "discountMember": 909,
    "expireTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "status": 19256,
    "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "175",
    "version": 942
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "175",
      "goodsId": "175",
      "attribute": "2ulodz",
      "value": "clhjlq",
      "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "175",
      "version": 607
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "175",
      "goodsId": "175",
      "specification": "6ntfji",
      "value": "pffocb",
      "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
      "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "175",
      "version": 829
    }
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "eydxuv",
  "errmsg": "7v7720",
  "data": {}
}

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Description: 商品详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/detail?id=175

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

object

any object.

2.团购管理

2.1.查询参与用户

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/join

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询参与用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

status

int16

团购状态

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

ruleId

string

团购规则ID

false

-

grouponId

string

团购ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/join?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=ya8gxq&order=6odwvt&status=8436&userId=175&ruleId=175&grouponId=175

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "udh8s5",
  "errmsg": "pzwg8n",
  "data": {}
}

2.6.团购规则删除

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 团购规则删除

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

团购规则ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/delete --data 'id=175'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

{

  "errmsg": "fuu4ba",
  "data": {}
}

3.1.查询

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/feedback/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/feedback/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=ilps6c&order=qvua7c&userId=175&username=deneen.will&mobile=386-815-1019

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "a0cl8m",
  "errmsg": "82ugd6",
  "data": {}
}

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

int32

false

-

limit

int32

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

id

string

false

-

name

string

false

4.3.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/create --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "name": "deneen.will",
  "depict": "n9sxpf",
  "mail": "s9wjhp",
  "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "floorPrice": 62,
  "address": "177 Doyle Crest， North Lincolnhaven， LA 36975",
  "version": 912
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "wc0580",
  "errmsg": "0rg58d",
  "data": {}
}

4.4.编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/update --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "userId": "175",
  "name": "deneen.will",
  "depict": "ouk0gm",
  "mail": "pf8et5",
  "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "address": "177 Doyle Crest， North Lincolnhaven， LA 36975",
  "floorPrice": 874,
  "lookCount": 162,
  "likeCount": 696,
  "commentCount": 511,
  "status": 72,
  "weight": 176,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 426
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "lzveeq",
  "errmsg": "xrhuwa",
  "data": {}
}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

int32

int32

false

string

false

string

false

-

adminId

string

通知管理员

false

-

title

string

通知标题

false

-

type

string

false

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

inviterId

string

分享人

false

-

status

int16

分享状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/share/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=nmo7ah&order=qwnda5&userId=175&inviterId=175&status=9506

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "lexfqz",
  "errmsg": "z7mapz",
  "data": {}
}

string

false

-

link

string

所广告的商品页面或者活动页面链接地址

false

-

url

string

广告宣传图片

false

-

position

int8

广告位置：1则是首页

false

-

content

string

活动内容

false

-

startTime

string

广告开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

广告结束时间

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启动

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/ad/create --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "name": "deneen.will",
  "link": "cjrbtl",
  "url": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "position": 19,
  "content": "6xcn8d",
  "startTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "endTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "enabled": true,
  "weight": 47,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 455
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

  "errmsg": "vq2u9g",
  "data": {}

Author: Ysling

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

mail

string

邮箱

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

username

string

账号名称

false

-

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/admin/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=jjl0cl&order=saqm7f&mail=7re4sn&mobile=386-815-1019&username=deneen.will

  "username": "deneen.will",

  "lastLoginIp": "216.105.228.231",

  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",

}'

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

  "url": "www.zachery-anderson.io",

  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -F 'upfile=' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/storage/uploadFile

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

  "errmsg": "pvl5ie",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/join

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询参与用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

taskId

string

赏金规则ID

false

-

rewardId

string

赏金参与ID

false

-

status

int16

赏金状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/join?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=ya1562&order=7fcv2p&userId=175&taskId=175&rewardId=175&status=10905

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

any object.

18.4.编辑赏金规则

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑赏金规则

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

赏金任务规则表ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

goodsPrice

number

商品价格

false

-

picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

award

number

奖励金额

false

-

joinersMember

int32

参与者数量

false

-

rewardMember

int32

活动数量

false

-

status

int16

赏金任务状态，0正常，1已完成，2已取消

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/update --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "goodsId": "175",
  "goodsName": "deneen.will",
  "goodsPrice": 348,
  "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "award": 795,
  "joinersMember": 66,
  "rewardMember": 125,
  "status": 28460,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 974
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "tivea6",
  "errmsg": "d6hs7a",
  "data": {}
}

Author: Ysling

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

orderSn

string

订单编号

false

-

brandId

string

店铺ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

showType

int32

查询类型

false

-

shipSn

string

物流单号

false

-

start

string

开始日期

false

-

end

string

截至日期

false

-

orderStatusArray

array

订单状态列表

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/order/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=504dw6&order=a2iv01&mobile=386-815-1019&orderSn=6w3ipp&brandId=175&goodsId=175&showType=99&shipSn=p4bosj&start=2026-05-04 16:53:51&end=2026-05-04 16:53:51&orderStatusArray=16403,16403

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

any object.

-

Response-example:

{

  "errmsg": "cugxxs",
  "data": {}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

true

string

false

-

int32

false

-

limit

int32

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

data

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/dynamic/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 修改日常

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

动态表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

content

string

发表内容

false

-

picUrls

array

图片地址列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

isAdmin

boolean

是否管理员，0不是，1是

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/dynamic/update --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "userId": "175",
  "content": "2w65jy",
  "picUrls": [
    "y1b1qp"
  ],
  "likeCount": 988,
  "lookCount": 640,
  "commentCount": 10,
  "isAdmin": true,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 148
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ya4twv",
  "errmsg": "yrou2r",
  "data": {}
}

object

any object.

-

  "errmsg": "p04hvu",

content

string

false

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

string

false

string

false

string

创建通知的管理员ID，如果是系统内置通知则是0.

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

  "title": "ffxe3z",
  "content": "4q8urb",
  "adminId": "175",
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:51",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 115
}'

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/read?id=175

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

Response-example:

29.4.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/create --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "name": "deneen.will",
  "depict": "js82wn",
  "tag": "r0ll0z",
  "total": 266,
  "discount": 937,
  "min": 73,
  "limit": 953,
  "type": 2559,
  "status": 12127,
  "goodsType": 25310,
  "goodsIds": [
    "fm8ix0"
  ],
  "code": "88817",
  "timeType": 5447,
  "days": 9009,
  "startTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "endTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 865
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "yuubt7",
  "errmsg": "zl5cj9",
  "data": {}
}

29.5.编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/update --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "name": "deneen.will",
  "depict": "kxsa8o",
  "tag": "h2qd9n",
  "total": 178,
  "discount": 333,
  "min": 944,
  "limit": 31631,
  "type": 13631,
  "status": 13310,
  "goodsType": 1317,
  "goodsIds": [
    "wfgrix"
  ],
  "code": "88817",
  "timeType": 15241,
  "days": 25903,
  "startTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "endTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 774
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ls8lq7",
  "errmsg": "274tk3",
  "data": {}
}

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

question

string

问题标题

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/issue/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=ikykcm&order=ls08yl&question=ty3m2v

32.4.角色添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/role/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 角色添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

角色表ID

false

-

name

string

角色名称

false

-

depict

string

角色描述

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启用

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/role/create --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "name": "deneen.will",
  "depict": "v1tuv1",
  "enabled": true,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 603
}'

data

33.专题管理

33.1.专题列表

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 专题列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

title

string

标题

false

-

subtitle

string

子标题

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=4d94in&order=5b53k8&title=n992mv&subtitle=3rg299

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "jjnc3f",
  "errmsg": "fnrk2o",
  "data": {}
}

33.2.专题添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 专题添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

专题表ID

false

-

title

string

专题标题

false

-

subtitle

string

专题子标题

false

-

author

string

专题作者

false

-

content

string

专题内容，富文本格式

false

-

price

number

专题相关商品最低价

false

-

readCount

string

专题阅读量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

picUrl

string

专题图片

false

-

goodsIds

array

专题相关商品，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/create --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "title": "7px7m2",
  "subtitle": "4ouwcy",
  "author": "Mr. Neil Rutherford",
  "content": "tmjc4z",
  "price": 366,
  "readCount": "7ftbsr",
  "likeCount": 612,
  "commentCount": 156,
  "picUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "goodsIds": [
    "luhhjd"
  ],
  "weight": 471,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 540
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

any object.

35.用户管理

35.1.用户查询

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

mobile

string

联系电话

false

-

inviter

string

用户邀请者

false

-

level

int8

用户等级

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=0jyujl&order=3vibx8&userId=175&username=deneen.will&mobile=386-815-1019&inviter=u7gakz&level=100

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "0rqd47",
  "errmsg": "4i082b",
  "data": {}
}

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/detail?id=175

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "qmta0k",
  "errmsg": "vn2sdo",
  "data": {}
}

35.3.用户编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 用户编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户表ID

false

-

inviter

string

邀请者

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

password

string

用户密码

false

-

trueName

string

真实姓名

false

-

gender

int8

性别：0 未知， 1男， 2女

false

-

birthday

string

生日

false

-

shareUrl

string

个人分享图片

false

-

lastLoginTime

string

最近一次登录时间

false

-

lastLoginIp

string

最近一次登录IP地址

false

-

userLevel

int8

0 普通用户，1 VIP用户，2 高级VIP用户

false

-

integral

number

用户积分

false

-

nickName

string

用户昵称或网络名称

false

-

mobile

string

用户手机号码

false

-

avatarUrl

string

用户头像图片

false

-

openid

string

微信登录openid

false

-

sessionKey

string

微信登录会话KEY

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/update --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "inviter": "83culs",
  "username": "deneen.will",
  "password": "qakg6o",
  "trueName": "deneen.will",
  "gender": 118,
  "birthday": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "shareUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "lastLoginTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "lastLoginIp": "216.105.228.231",
  "userLevel": 95,
  "integral": 941,
  "nickName": "quintin.medhurst",
  "mobile": "386-815-1019",
  "avatarUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "openid": "175",
  "sessionKey": "qnkkcf",
  "status": 74,
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 588
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "bnwfc1",
  "errmsg": "qzvkb9",
  "data": {}
}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

file

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

-

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

dealType

int16

交易类型

false

-

status

boolean

交易状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/deal-list?id=175&page=1&limit=10&sort=1t14ob&order=r5tr89&userId=175&dealType=1299&status=true

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

any object.

  "errmsg": "3knovu",
  "data": {}
}

false

password

string

数据库驱动

false

创建时间

false

updateTime

string

false

boolean

false

string

false

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/tenant/create --data '{
  "id": "175",
  "address": "177 Doyle Crest， North Lincolnhaven， LA 36975",
  "appId": "175",
  "appSecret": "cun3kc",
  "aesKey": "txil2r",
  "token": "5zolfr",
  "mchId": "175",
  "mchKey": "i5nndh",
  "keyPath": "b5ygtr",
  "apiV3Key": "qcguae",
  "privateCertPath": "ebetph",
  "privateKeyPath": "24nwdh",
  "jdbcUrl": "www.zachery-anderson.io",
  "username": "deneen.will",
  "password": "u8ifn9",
  "driverClassName": "deneen.will",
  "addTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-04 16:53:52",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "175",
  "version": 866
}'
